description_long: This is a large, stately house set within a landscaped lot featuring lush greenery and flowering trees. The house itself has a symmetrical facade with a central entrance, flanked by two prominent wings and a driveway leading up to the front. The roof is a combination of gable and hip styles, with multiple slopes and dormer windows. The rear of the property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and patio area, surrounded by privacy fencing and mature trees. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale residential neighborhood.
description: A large, elegant house with a symmetrical facade, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and lush landscaping with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and privacy fencing.
description_view_2: View of the house from the opposite side, with the driveway, entry steps, and dense tree coverage visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool area, patio, and extensive garden landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, small porch, and decorative columns
